name: bot-012-news-video
description: Render a structured NewsDoc as a short news VIDEO with Remotion, in one of four styles (Headline Highlight, Breaking News, Kinetic Typography, Minimal Editorial) at one or more aspect ratios (16:9, 9:16, 1:1). Use this AFTER bot-012-news-structure has written newsdoc.json. Also use to RESTYLE/RESIZE an existing project (new style or aspect ratio) without re-extracting the news. Bundles a complete, pre-built Remotion project; you only choose the style, write props.json, and render — you never hand-write React.

inputs.name: style
inputs.description: headline-highlight | breaking-news | kinetic-typography | minimal-editorial. Default = the NewsDoc's recommended_style, else minimal-editorial.

inputs.name: aspect-ratios
inputs.description: Any of 16:9, 9:16, 1:1 (space/comma separated). Default = onboarding default, else 9:16.

inputs.name: brand
inputs.description: Brand accent color (hex) plus optional accentAlt and a short label. Default from context.md, else neutral.

outputs.name: storyboard
outputs.description: Scenes + frame ranges + on-screen text + style/AR/defaults used.

outputs.name: videos
outputs.description: One rendered MP4 per requested aspect ratio.

outputs.name: project
outputs.description: The reproducible Remotion project (bundled template + props.json).
